error.name: Please enter a location name
error.selenium_unavailable: The Selenium server is not accessible
error.chromium_not_found: Chromium or Google Chrome is not installed
error.invalid_update_interval: Enter an update interval of at least one hour
error.browser_required: Enter a remote Selenium WebDriver URL or select local browser
error.browser_conflict: Choose either a remote Selenium WebDriver or local browser, not both
error.remote_browser_required: South Kesteven requires a remote Selenium WebDriver; enter its HTTP(S) URL and turn off local browser
error.invalid_webdriver_url: Enter a valid HTTP or HTTPS Selenium WebDriver URL with a host
error.council_change_not_supported: An existing entry cannot change council. Add a new integration entry for a different council
error.duplicate_entry: An equivalent UK Bin Collection entry already exists

abort.reconfigure_failed: The integration entry could not be found
abort.reconfigure_successful: The integration entry was updated successfully

error.invalid_update_interval: Enter an update interval of at least one hour

dependency_error.title: A Python dependency is missing or shadowed
dependency_error.description: UK Bin Collection could not safely load a browser dependency. {details} Check the reported module path; a package placed directly in /config can shadow the installed Python package. Move the conflicting folder out of /config, restart Home Assistant, and reload this entry.

missing_required_configuration.title: UK Bin Collection configuration is incomplete
missing_required_configuration.description: This entry is missing: {fields}. Use Reconfigure on the integration entry and supply the missing address/browser values.

browser_unavailable.title: The Selenium browser is unavailable
browser_unavailable.description: UK Bin Collection could not reach or start its configured browser. {details} Check the WebDriver address or local browser, then reload this entry.
